results.title: Pakistan warns of cyber, climate threats to peacekeepers on UN observance day
results.description: Pakistan on Friday paid tribute to United Nations peacekeepers serving around the world, saying modern conflicts were becoming increasingly complex and warning that peacekeeping missions now face challenges ranging from cyber threats and misinformation to climate-driven humanitarian emergencies. The statements came as the international community marked the International Day of United Nations Peacekeepers, observed annually [...]
results.source: Daily Times - Latest Pakistan News, World, Busines

results.title: 'He's always been my hero': Ohio bride gets married on hospital rooftop so her ailing dad could be there
results.description: When two wedding plans fell through, nurses at the Cleveland Clinic stepped in to make sure a dying father could walk his daughter down the aisle.

results.title: 5th judge since 2022, 43 NIA cases: Supreme Court order on speedy UAPA trials and a reality check
results.description: At 81 cases, including 38 not lodged by NIA, the NIA court in Delhi is hearing 8 times the number recommended by the top court

results.title: Mbah’s Leadership Redefines Governance In Enugu, Says Nwaokobia
results.description: A good governance advocate, leadership trainer and publicist, Chris Mustapha Nwaokobia Jnr., has commended Enugu State governor, Peter Ndubuisi Mbah, saying his leadership has redefined governance in the state through what he described as bold and transformative policies. In a statement marking the governor’s third anniversary in office, Nwaokobia said Mbah’s administration has delivered measurable [...]
